headline: Beyond Meat Q4 Loss Wider Than Estimates, Revenues Decline Y/Y
summary: BYND faces steep sales and margin pressure as weak demand and rising costs weigh on results, with cautious first-quarter 2026 revenue guidance ahead.

headline: 2 Magnificent S&P 500 Dividend Stocks Down as Much as 55% to Buy and Hold Forever
summary: Wall Street is extremely downbeat on these two S&P 500 stocks, but their turnarounds are starting to take shape.
